title: Evil Dead: A Fistful of Boomstick
short_description: Ash Williams and his chainsaw-hand do battle with the Deadites across time in this hack-and-slash action game.
description: Evil Dead: A Fistful of Boomstick is a 2003 action hack-and-slash developed by VIS Entertainment and published by THQ. Set eleven years after Army of Darkness, Ash Williams is once again drawn into battle with the Deadites when a TV journalist accidentally broadcasts the Necronomicon's incantation live. Armed with his boomstick, chainsaw, and a growing arsenal of acquired spells, players battle through present-day, colonial-era, and Civil War-era Dearborn, Michigan. Bruce Campbell returns to voice Ash, with supporting cast including Tom Kenny and Rob Paulsen.
